briefs.title: BC Gaming Operators Must Follow New Anti-Money-Laundering Rules Starting April 2026
briefs.summary: A new BC regulation takes effect April 13, 2026, setting formal definitions and compliance rules for gaming operators around money laundering (illegally disguising the source of criminal money) and unlawful activity detection, including rules covering high-value chips, patron accounts, and sports betting.
briefs.action_required: Review your gaming compliance program against the new Prevention and Detection of Unlawful Activities Regulation before April 13, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Prevention and Detection of Unlawful Activities Regulation takes effect
